programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.sub-title: Tamron's Tasting Table: Team Tam cooks!
programme.desc: The "Tamron Hall" staff cook dishes that reflect where they come from and who they are beyond the studio; how to make smoked turkey neck oxtail, prosciutto and shallot fettuccine, jambalaya with a twist, bacalaitos, ceviche, and vegan sweet potato pudding.

programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.sub-title: Tamron's Tasting Table: Team Tam cooks!
programme.desc: The "Tamron Hall" staff cook dishes that reflect where they come from and who they are beyond the studio; how to make smoked turkey neck oxtail, prosciutto and shallot fettuccine, jambalaya with a twist, bacalaitos, ceviche, and vegan sweet potato pudding.
